sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Compare segmentation more carefully
before = last_transition.before_frame
after = last_transition.after_frame

before_nodes = before.segmentation['nodes']
after_nodes = after.segmentation['nodes']

print(f"Before: {len(before_nodes)} nodes, After: {len(after_nodes)} nodes")

# Find differences by hash
before_by_hash = {}
for n in before_nodes:
    before_by_hash.setdefault(n['hash'], []).append(n)

after_by_hash = {}
for n in after_nodes:
    after_by_hash.setdefault(n['hash'], []).append(n)

# Check which hashes are new or changed
for h in set(after_by_hash.keys()) - set(before_by_hash.keys()):
    print(f"New hash: {h}, nodes: {after_by_hash[h]}")

for h in set(before_by_hash.keys()) - set(after_by_hash.keys()):
    print(f"Removed hash: {h}, nodes: {before_by_hash[h]}")

# Check for pixel count changes
for n in after_nodes:
    before_match = [b for b in before_nodes if b['hash'] == n['hash']]
    if before_match:
        if before_match[0]['pixels'] != n['pixels']:
            print(f"Pixel change: hash={n['hash']}, before={before_match[0]['pixels']}, after={n['pixels']}")
    else:
        print(f"New node: id={n['id']}, color={n['color']}, pixels={n['pixels']}, hash={n['hash']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
